description_long: This is a classic Santa Claus hat, featuring a soft, plush red body with a slightly wrinkled and slouched appearance. The base of the hat is encircled by a thick, white, fuzzy band that mimics faux fur, providing a distinct contrast to the red fabric. At the tip of the hat, a round, white pom-pom is attached, adding a playful and festive touch. The hat appears to be made from soft, flexible materials, likely a combination of felt or velvet for the red portion and synthetic fur for the white trim and pom-pom. The surface shows some subtle shading and wear, giving it a slightly used, realistic look. This hat is typically associated with holiday celebrations and is designed to fit comfortably on a person's head.
description: A classic Santa Claus hat with a red, plush body, white fuzzy trim, and a round white pom-pom at the tip. The hat is soft, festive, and slightly slouched.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the red plush body, white fuzzy trim, and the pom-pom resting to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view with the pom-pom clearly visible and the hat's slouched shape more pronounced.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the red body, white trim, and the pom-pom extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing mostly the red plush body and the white trim, with the pom-pom barely visible.
attribute_brim_style: wide, soft, and fuzzy band with no structured brim
attribute_crown_shape: slouched and rounded with a drooping tip
